2025 ICLR 中稿论文分布与清单

  • 状态：available
  • 官方入口：https://openreview.net/group?id=ICLR.cc/2025/Conference
  • 备注：OpenReview accepted submissions available.
  • 纳入论文数：3703

Distribution

领域 篇数 占比
LLM/NLP 723 19.5%
Computer Vision 669 18.1%
Multimodal 25 0.7%
Reinforcement Learning 220 5.9%
Robotics/Embodied AI 48 1.3%
Generative Models 293 7.9%
AI for Science 131 3.5%
ML Theory 129 3.5%
Optimization 130 3.5%
Trustworthy/Safety/Fairness 279 7.5%
Data/Training Systems 966 26.1%
Applications 88 2.4%
Other 2 0.1%
Total 3703 100.0%

Keywords / Topic Clusters

聚类/领域 高频关键词
LLM/NLP including LLMs(268), Large Language Models(119), safety(86), privacy(84), fairness(82), and societal considerations(82), audio(69), language(69), and other modalities(69), Large Language Model(54)
Computer Vision language(245), audio(244), and other modalities(244), self-supervised(68), semi-supervised(68), and supervised representation learning(68), including LLMs(43), meta learning(24), and lifelong learning(24), fairness(20)
Multimodal self-supervised(7), semi-supervised(7), and supervised representation learning(7), including LLMs(4), safety(4), fairness(3), privacy(3), and societal considerations(3), multimodal(2), audio(2)
Reinforcement Learning Reinforcement Learning(51), reinforcement learning(43), planning(13), autonomy(11), Offline Reinforcement Learning(10), including LLMs(8), etc.)(8), offline reinforcement learning(7), Imitation Learning(7), multi-agent reinforcement learning(6)
Robotics/Embodied AI autonomy(39), planning(39), Robotics(7), Embodied AI(7), Robot Learning(6), Imitation Learning(3), Robot Manipulation(3), large language model(2), autonomous driving(2), etc.)(2)
Generative Models diffusion models(34), Diffusion Models(31), audio(29), etc.)(29), language(28), and other modalities(28), generative models(25), chemistry(18), biology(18), Diffusion models(16)
AI for Science biology(110), etc.)(108), chemistry(106), AI4Science(6), flow matching(5), protein design(5), Partial Differential Equations(4), deep learning(4), diffusion models(4), Graph Neural Networks(3)
ML Theory self-supervised(11), semi-supervised(11), and supervised representation learning(11), none of the above)(10), generalization(8), Generalization(6), learning theory(5), sampling(4), feature learning(4), representation learning(4)
Optimization etc.)(10), optimization(10), none of the above)(8), sampling(8), variational inference(7), UQ(7), convex optimization(6), nonconvex optimization(6), Optimization(6), stochastic optimization(6)
Trustworthy/Safety/Fairness fairness(170), safety(168), privacy(165), and societal considerations(163), adversarial robustness(16), self-supervised(12), semi-supervised(12), and supervised representation learning(12), differential privacy(12), Fairness(11)
Data/Training Systems including LLMs(117), self-supervised(98), semi-supervised(98), and supervised representation learning(98), etc.)(79), none of the above)(72), audio(62), language(60), and other modalities(60), variational inference(51)
Applications audio(8), language(8), and other modalities(8), etc.)(8), including LLMs(7), search(6), none of the above)(6), planning(5), reasoning(5), LLM(4)
Other complexity(1), causal reasoning(1), Pearl's Causal Hierarchy(1), identifiability(1), SCM(1), causal discovery(1), linear SCM(1), confounder(1)
